overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an astronaut in a spacesuit exploring a foggy industrial mining facility or communications hub at night. The character opens a large pressure door and walks through a haze-filled exterior platform toward a large ground vehicle, using a flashlight to navigate the low-visibility environment.

events.description: character turns the wheel and opens the large pressure door, releasing fog into the chamber
character steps through the doorway from the sheltered interior into the foggy exterior platform

agents.ego_description: standing at the pressure door, turning the wheel mechanism to open it, then proceeding through the doorway

entered.detail: large circular metal door with locking wheel mechanism and small window
yellow warning label affixed to the door frame
safety railings along the edge of the exterior platform
stacked blue containers with corporate logos visible on the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow airlock chamber where the character interacts with a large pressure door. After turning the wheel to open it, the character steps out onto a foggy industrial platform, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the exposed exterior environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with safety railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy platform, holding a flashlight to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: tall industrial light fixture with dual lamps cutting through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated industrial walkway surrounded by thick fog. Metal railings line the right side while blue supply crates sit to the left. The flashlight beam cuts through the haze as the character passes flood light poles illuminating the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with scattered equipment

events.description: large ground vehicle emerges from the fog ahead, its lights becoming visible through the haze

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the fog while scanning ahead with the flashlight, approaching the large vehicle

entered.detail: massive industrial transport vehicle with multiple headlights and a boxy rear section
large cylindrical pipes and hoses lying on the ground near the vehicle
metal sheets and equipment parts strewn across the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider industrial yard as the character leaves the railed walkway behind. Through the dense fog, a massive ground vehicle gradually becomes visible with its headlights glowing. The character continues walking past scattered debris and industrial pipes toward the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle docking area with connection cables

events.description: mission objective UI text appears indicating arrival at the communications hub access point
character slows and circles around the rear of the vehicle, examining the hatch and cables

agents.ego_description: approaching the vehicle rear, examining the hatch and connection cables while shining the flashlight on the vehicle's surface

entered.detail: large rectangular access door on the back of the vehicle with locking mechanisms
thick industrial hoses and cables connecting the vehicle to ground equipment

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the massive vehicle and begins circling around its rear section. The vehicle's access hatch and connection cables become prominent in the foreground as the flashlight illuminates the metal surface. A UI objective marker appears, confirming this is the communications hub access point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a sheltered airlock into a vast, fog-shrouded industrial yard. It begins inside a narrow chamber where the character opens a large pressure door, stepping from the interior into the thick haze of an exposed exterior platform. As the character advances along an elevated walkway, the flashlight beam cuts through the fog, passing blue supply crates and illuminated floodlight poles. The scene then opens into a wider yard as the character leaves the railings behind, moving past scattered debris and pipes toward the glowing headlights of a massive ground vehicle emerging from the mist. Finally, the camera circles the rear of the vehicle, bringing the access hatch and connection cables into sharp focus as a UI objective marker appears.
